title: Tempting Dense Slovakian Stracciatella Cheese Pasta
description: A floral and dense Slovakian dish featuring stracciatella cheese, perfect for crowds, with a dairy-free friendly option. This dish is a crowd-pleaser and can be made with minimal adjustments for dairy-free diets.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic and onion until softened.
Add the stracciatella cheese to the skillet and stir until melted and smooth.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss with the cheese sauce.
Stir in the pasta water and lemon juice to create a creamy emulsion.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.
For a dairy-free option, substitute the stracciatella cheese with a dairy-free alternative.
Adjust the amount of pasta water to achieve the desired consistency.
